settings.text:
At CPS, we’re always working to make your shopping experience smoother and more effortless.
That’s why we’ve gathered the most common questions from our customers — so you can find quick answers and enjoy a seamless shopping journey without the wait.

settings.heading: Account & Website
settings.content:
How do I create an account?
Join the CPS crew. Create your account with your name, email, and a password. For a faster setup, connect with your Facebook or Google account. A CPS account gets you quicker checkouts, order tracking, and exclusive access to perks like gift cards for returns.

How can I change my password?
Go to the login page. If you’ve forgotten your password, click the “Forgot your password?” link. You’ll receive an email with a link to reset your password.

What should I do if I'm having trouble using the website?
If the site is giving you a hard time, make sure cookies and JavaScript are enabled in your browser. If you still have issues, our customer service team is on standby. Hit us up at (+66) 2118 2000 or email customerservice@jaspal.co.th. We'll sort it out.

settings.heading: Order& Shipping Information
settings.content:
How can I track my order?

You can track your order in a few ways:

  • After logging in to your account, you can view your order status in "Order history" under the My Account menu.
  • In your shipment confirmation email, click the "View your order" button to see your order details.
  • For a direct check, go to the DHL website and enter your order number:
    https://ecommerceportal.dhl.com/track/pages/customer/trackItNowPublic.xhtml


What are the shipping times and costs?
We offer standard delivery within Thailand for 60 THB. Your order will be processed within 48 hours of confirmation and shipped on a business day.

Do you ship internationally?
Yes, CPS ships globally with our partner, DHL. All items shipped internationally are final sale and cannot be returned or exchanged.

Will I be charged customs or import duties?
For international orders, your shipment may be subject to local import duties and taxes. These charges are determined by your local customs authority and are your responsibility.

Can I change or cancel my order after it’s been placed?
Once your order is confirmed, we can't modify or cancel it. If you have second thoughts upon delivery, refer to our domestic return policy.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchanges
settings.content:
What’s the deal with returns and exchanges?
If you're in Thailand, you can return items within 7 days of receiving them, provided they are in their original, unworn condition with all tags attached. For hygiene reasons, cosmetics and perfumes must be unopened, and items like jewelry, swimwear, bodysuits, and intimates cannot be returned or exchanged. "End of Season" sale items and purchases made with online credit are final.

How do I start a return or exchange?
• Online Returns: Log in to your account and go to "Order history." If you checked out as a guest, use your order number and email to access the return form. Once approved, you have 7 days to send the item back.
• In-Store Exchanges: Visit any CPS store within 14 days. Bring the item and your Delivery Order (D/O) documents.

When will I see my refund?
Once we receive your return, our team will inspect it within 3-5 working days. Your refund will then be processed within 7 working days and issued as a gift card, valid for 30 days. If you paid by credit or debit card, refunds could take up to 45 working days, depending on your bank.

Can I return or exchange sale items?
"End of Season" sale items are final. Items from other promotions can be returned for a gift card, in line with our policy.

What if my item arrives damaged or defective?
If you receive a faulty item, contact our Customer Relations Department immediately at customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Include a photo of the item and your receipt to expedite the process.

settings.heading: Payment Information
settings.content:
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept various secure payment methods for a smooth checkout. Your financial details are kept safe.

Is your site secure for payments?
Absolutely. Our website has strong security measures in place. Our "Privacy & Cookies Policy" details how we protect your personal information.

How do I use a discount or promotional code?
Enter your promotional code in the designated field at checkout. Ensure you're logged into your CPS account, as our exclusive promotions are typically for members only.

settings.heading: Product Information
settings.content:
How do I find the right size or fit?
Use our size guide to find your perfect fit. We provide detailed measurement charts for our collections to help you choose with confidence. Compare your measurements to our guide to find your ideal CPS size.

How do I care for my items (washing and ironing instructions)?
To keep your CPS gear looking its best, follow the care instructions on the label of each item.
